description: This file contains Balanda locative predication clauses. These sentences describe the location of a subject using the copular particle 'no' followed by a locative preposition and its object.

rules.function: Expresses location or spatial relation of the subject
rules.preposition_role: Encodes spatial relationship (in, under, behind, on, above, near, in front of, beside)
rules.tense_interpretation: Present or timeless state unless modified by tense markers in other constructions
constraints: The particle 'no' must appear between the subject and the preposition
Prepositions must be followed by a locative object
No tense or aspect marking appears in this construction
No negation appears in this file
Plurality and definiteness are inferred from context
This construction is distinct from possession and nominal predication

The child is under the table
The school is behind the market
The bike is on the car
The shoe is above the tree
The cat is in the house
The drum is beside the table
The girl is in front of the house
